content_of_post_to_comment: One of the hardest things in life is accepting that other people’s imagination is not the limit of your potential. Many dreams sound unreasonable to those who never had them. Many paths seem impossible to those who never walked them. And many people confuse their fears with your reality. But you are the one who has to wake up with your choices. You are the one who has to live with your regrets. So why should someone else decide how big your life is allowed to be? People will call your dreams unrealistic. Until they become real. People will question your decisions. Until they begin to admire them. Funny enough, the world often calls something impossible right up until someone does it. You are not here to fit inside other people’s expectations. You are here to build a life that feels like home to you. Because it is better to fail while building your own dream than to succeed while living someone else’s.
